☁️ Gist Cloud Sync

Dong bo tu dong Admin → Web khach hang qua GitHub Gist (mien phi, khong can server)

Huong dan lay GitHub Token:
1. Vao github.com/settings/tokens/new
2. Note: THC Sync   Expiration: No expiration
3. Tich ✅ gist → Generate token → Copy

✓ Da ket noi Gist
